title: Responsive Form

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Form
Create a responsive form with a name field, email field, and submit button. Ensure that the form resizes properly on various screen sizes. Use Tailwind CSS classes to create a visually appealing design.
requirement1: ### Requirements
1. The form should have a max-width of 768px and be centered horizontally on the page.
requirement2: 2. The form fields and submit button should be horizontally aligned using grid or flexbox.
requirement3: 3. The form should be accessible on various screen sizes, including desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

constraints: Use only standard HTML and CSS (Tailwind CSS).
Make sure the form is fully functional (i.e., it should validate the email field and prevent submit on invalid input).
